author: codex-agent

patch.value: Observed during governance refactor: validate reports 9 missing_linked_paths for beads/install/todos command and builtins files, while independent git-vs-linked audit reports no missing paths. This item tracks root-cause analysis, deterministic reproduction, and behavior-correct fix.
Fix validate --check-files false-positive on linked project paths
Investigate and fix the validate check-files path matching anomaly where specific project files are reported missing even when they are linked in tracker items.

pm validate --check-files --scan-mode tracked-all reports zero false positives when linked project paths exist; regression tests cover the failing path set; docs describe any intentional filtering behavior.
Reproduction script and candidate path set are captured with linked files/tests/docs.
Restores trust in validate outputs used for governance automation
Prevents wasted remediation effort and incorrect tracker hygiene warnings
check-files path matching is deterministic and accurate
Current governance workflow is blocked by repeated false-positive warnings.
Run pm validate --check-files --scan-mode tracked-all and compare output against independent git-ls-files minus linked path audit; observe persistent 9-path mismatch.
Maintainers currently receive incorrect warnings that reduce confidence in project-management audits.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Duplicate-check evidence pm context --limit 10; pm search validate check-files missing_linked_paths false positive --limit 20; pm list-open --limit 20; pm list-in-progress --limit 20. Net-new because no existing item tracks this active false-positive behavior.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Independent git-vs-linked audit currently reports candidate=202 linked=222 missing=0 while validate reports 9 missing paths.

message: Create issue for validate check-files false-positive diagnostics | explicit_unset=learnings,blocked_by,blocked_reason,unblock_note,resolution,expected_result,actual_result,fixed_version

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Reproduction captured after governance remediation: pm validate --check-files --scan-mode tracked-all still reports 9 missing_linked_paths even after explicit linking. Independent audit (git tracked minus parsed project file links) reports candidate=202 linked=222 missing=0, confirming false-positive behavior in validate path matching layer.
